metadata.coverage: 366 370 692 new files (24 TB) incrementally crawled between 06 December 2019 and 31 January 2020 mainly from .PT domain and web sites crawled during the previous crawl.
metadata.creator: Portuguese Web Archive
metadata.description: Thirty one collection AWP. With Deduplicator.
metadata.notes: All the items of the AWP31 crawl are identified by the custom field pwacrawlid:AWP31. The AWP31 crawl is complete because it was performed with using DeDuplicator.
metadata.subject: Complete crawl of the Portuguese web; Portuguese Web Archive; Portuguese online publications; pwacrawlid:AWP31; 2020
metadata.title: The Thirty one crawl of the Portuguese web (incremental), performed in 2020 (AWP31).
